title: Tick Control in Hicksville, Long Island | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Hicksville, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts serving Hicksville. Call today for $125 - $325 service!
intro: Hicksville's beautiful residential neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Cantiague Park make it a wonderful place to live, but also create ideal conditions for tick populations. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Hicksville, protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks from your property while keeping your loved ones safe.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities like Hicksville with specialized tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments tailored to Hicksville's unique landscape, ensuring effective tick elimination while prioritizing the safety of your family, pets, and the environment.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of established suburban homes, wooded areas near the Bethpage Bike Trail, and proximity to recreational spaces creates perfect habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. Whether you live near the Broadway Mall area or in the residential neighborhoods surrounding Cantiague Park, our team understands the specific tick challenges facing Hicksville properties and delivers solutions that work.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Hicksville's suburban landscape with mature trees, shrubs, and proximity to parks creates ideal tick habitats. Ticks carry serious diseases like Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and babesiosis. Professional tick control reduces tick populations by up to 90%, protecting your family and pets who enjoy your yard and nearby recreational areas.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Hicksville runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. We recommend beginning treatments in early spring before tick populations explode and continuing through fall. Multiple seasonal applications provide the most comprehensive protection for Long Island properties.

faqs.question: What does your tick control service include for Hicksville homes?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of tick-prone areas like lawn perimeters, wooded borders, stone walls, and shaded areas. We use professional-grade products that eliminate adult ticks, nymphs, and larvae. Treatment typically covers up to 1 acre and includes follow-up recommendations. Pricing ranges from $125 to $325 depending on property size and infestation level.

faqs.question: Is tick control treatment safe for my children and pets in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products specifically approved for residential use. Treatments are applied by licensed technicians following strict safety protocols. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until surfaces dry. Once dry, treated areas are safe for normal family activities on your Hicksville property.
